Rules: News Trading
Trading restrictions during high-impact news events and economic calendar considerations.

April 2, 2026

Table of contents

Our Policy

We do not have any rules against or guidelines around trading news events.

Free reign, but beware of volatility and how it can affect your account.

Important Warnings

- You trade news AT YOUR OWN RISK.

- Beware of slippage - Orders may execute far from expected prices

- NEVER use the Daily Loss Limit as a stop loss - System protection may not be effective during extreme volatility

News events can cause rapid price movements, wider spreads, and unpredictable market behavior that may impact your trading results.

Keep in mind the Microscalping rule: Over 50% of your trades are longer than 10 seconds AND over 50% of your profit must come from trades held longer than 10 seconds.

If you do not meet the criteria, you will not be able to activate the evaluation or request a payout.
